name: Dexamethasone
description: Corticosteroid sịntetik na-eme ogologo oge. A na-eji maka edema ụbụrụ (elu elu cerebral edema - HACE, TBI), mmeghachi omume nfụkasị siri ike, edema ikuku, na nsogbu adrenal. Anti-inflammatory, ọ bụghị anabolic.
indications: Cerebral edema sitere na akpụ ma ọ bụ akpụ
Mmeghachi omume nfụkasị ahụ siri ike (na mgbakwunye na epinephrine)
dose: Cerebral edema/HACE: 8-10 mg IV/IM mbụ, emesia 4 mg q6h. Edema ikuku: 10 mg IV otu ugboro. Croup: 0.6 mg/kg IM/PO (max 16mg). Nsogbu adrenal: 4 mg IV.
window: HACE: Nye ozugbo enwere ike yana mgbadata ozugbo.
contraindications: Ọgwụ mgbochi nje dị ndụ n'ime ụbọchị 30 (ihe metụtara)
warnings: Anaghị edochi mgbanaka na oxygen maka HACE -- jiri naanị mgbakwunye.
Hyperglycemia - nyochaa glucose ọbara na ndị ọrịa mamịrị.
Otu doses maka ihe mberede na-adịkarị mma nke ukwuu.

pediatric.dose: Croup: 0.6 mg/kg PO/IM (karịa 16 mg). Cerebral edema: 0.5-1 mg / kg IV (max 10 mg). Edema nke ikuku: 0.5 mg / kg IV.

obstetric.note: A na-eji 12 mg IM q24h x 2 doses iji mee ka nwa ebu n'afọ too ntozu oke n'ime izu 24-34 n'ime ime ime tupu oge eruo. Gị na ndị na-eweta kacha dịnụ kparịta ụka.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
